n.description: Total number of individuals surveyed in the early 1990s; used in the npq rule check and in the standard error calculation.

x.description: Number of individuals who reported having two or more sexual partners in the prior 12 months; used together with n to compute the observed sample proportion (0.063598).

p_0.description: Hypothesized population proportion of individuals with two or more sexual partners from the 1970s study; used in the npq rule check, the standard error formula, and as the reference value in the z-statistic numerator.
